docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,075.03 FILED BY FEIGHERY, JUSTINE AS TO DEFENDANT DATTANI, KAUSHIK C/O DIVA INVESTMENT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-19-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-19-2019 - JUDGMENT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FEIGHERY, JUSTINE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DATTANI, KAUSHIK C/O DIVA INVESTMENT $1,400.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,490.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF FEIGHERY, JUSTINE AS TO DEFENDANT DATTANI, KAUSHIK C/O DIVA INVESTMENT
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY DEFENDANT DATTANI, KAUSHIK C/O DIVA INVESTMENT
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED FEB-03-2020 ORDERED DESTROYED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-19-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-19-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF JUSTINE FEIGHERY IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT KAUSHIK DATTANI IS PRESENT. WITNESS' FOR THE DEFENDANT HAZEL AND WALTER (CLEANING CREW). NO PROOF OF SERVICE FILED. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
